# Boses by Temujin Technologies

> Boses is an AI-powered market research simulation platform purpose-built for Southeast Asia. It simulates how real Filipino, Indonesian, Vietnamese, Thai, Malaysian, and Singaporean consumers react to products, campaigns, and concepts — using AI personas grounded in on-the-ground ethnographic fieldwork. Research-grade insights in hours, not months.

## Product

- **Platform:** Web-based SaaS (early access / pre-launch)
- **Website:** https://www.temujintechnologies.com
- **App:** https://app.temujintechnologies.com
- **Free demo:** https://www.temujintechnologies.com/personas
- **Company:** Temujin Technologies
- **Contact:** hello@temujintechnologies.com
- **Markets:** Philippines, Singapore, Malaysia, Indonesia, Vietnam, Thailand

## What Boses Does

Boses lets product managers, marketers, and strategy teams run consumer simulations without traditional market research. Instead of spending ₱500,000+ (~$9,000+ USD) and 6–12 weeks on focus groups and surveys, teams upload a product brief, select a persona cohort, and run a simulation in minutes to hours. Reports are shareable via public permalinks — no login required for stakeholders.

## Research Methods Supported

1. **Concept Test** — Upload a product concept, ad, or campaign and get sentiment breakdowns and verbatim reactions from your target cohort. Best for: ad pretesting, packaging concepts, value-prop validation.
2. **AI-Assisted In-Depth Interview (IDI)** — Boses automatically conducts scripted 1-on-1 interviews with every persona; delivers full transcripts and a cross-persona report. Best for: discovery research, jobs-to-be-done, pricing research.
3. **Manual IDI** — The researcher chats live with an AI persona and generates a report when finished. Best for: live exploration during stakeholder presentations or rapid hypothesis testing.
4. **Survey** — Upload an existing survey; every persona fills it out independently. Outputs include per-question distributions, segment breakdowns, and verbatim explanations. Best for: quantifying preferences at scale.
5. **Focus Group** — Personas discuss a topic in a two-round moderated session, surfacing consensus and disagreement. Best for: brand positioning, sensitive-topic exploration.
6. **Conjoint / Trade-Off Analysis** — Present product profiles with varying attributes (price, features, brand) to discover what consumers actually trade off. Best for: pricing, feature prioritization, SKU rationalization.

## Markets Supported (with behavioral context)

- **Philippines (PH)** — ~110M population. High social-commerce adoption (Lazada/Shopee daily). Family-centric purchasing, "baon" school-snack culture, strong word-of-mouth via Viber/Messenger group chats. Personas grounded in Metro Manila, Cebu, Davao, and Mindanao regional contexts.
- **Indonesia (ID)** — ~280M population, world's 4th-largest country. Tokopedia/Shopee dominant for e-commerce; Gojek embedded in commute + delivery. Strong Jakarta/Surabaya/Bandung regional differences. Halal certification matters across FMCG.
- **Vietnam (VN)** — ~100M population, young median age. Fast-rising digital payments (MoMo, ZaloPay). Hanoi (north) and Ho Chi Minh City (south) have distinct consumer behavior. Trust signals: family endorsements + Facebook reviews.
- **Thailand (TH)** — ~70M population. LINE (not WhatsApp) is the primary messaging + commerce platform. Bangkok-vs-upcountry urban-rural divide is meaningful. Buddhist cultural context shapes marketing tone.
- **Malaysia (MY)** — ~33M population, multi-ethnic (Malay/Chinese/Indian) with halal as a default-on requirement in FMCG. Klang Valley urban purchasing differs sharply from Sabah/Sarawak.
- **Singapore (SG)** — ~6M population, highest per-capita income in SEA. Multi-lingual, pragmatic value-conscious buying despite high incomes. HDB-flat-living shapes everyday consumption.

## Persona Schema (15 fields)

Each Boses persona includes:

1. Name (real-sounding, country-appropriate)
2. Age (18-99)
3. Gender (Female / Male / Non-binary)
4. Location (specific district/city, Country)
5. Occupation (specific role + employer-type, not "office worker")
6. Income level (Low / Middle / Upper-middle / High)
7. Family situation (marital status, children, household composition)
8. Personality traits (4 short adjectives)
9. Day in the life (3-4 sentence narrative naming real brands, stores, transit)
10. Pain points (daily friction, frustrations)
11. Aspirational identity (how they want to be seen)
12. Digital behavior (named apps and platforms)
13. Buying triggers (what causes conversion, what causes abandonment)
14. Values (3 short value statements)
15. Behavioral insight (synthesis of distinct buying behavior)

## Persona Types

- **AI-generated:** Built from target market parameters (age, location, occupation, income).
- **Boses-curated:** Validated against real people through on-the-ground ethnographic fieldwork across Southeast Asia.

## Competitive Differentiation

- 10–100x faster than traditional market research (hours vs. weeks)
- ~95% cost reduction vs traditional focus groups (~$9,000+ per study → platform subscription)
- Culturally accurate to SEA — not generic global or Western archetypes
- Single platform for all six major qualitative and quantitative research methods
- Simulation reports include shareable public links — no login required for stakeholders
- Pre-validated against real human IDI panels (theme-overlap scoring vs. golden human data)

## Free Interactive Demo

A free, no-account-required demo at https://www.temujintechnologies.com/personas lets prospects generate 3 AI personas for any Southeast Asian market.

**How it works:** Pick a market (PH/SG/MY/ID/VN/TH) → describe your audience (20-1000 chars) → complete Cloudflare Turnstile captcha → submit work email (Gmail/Yahoo not accepted) → receive 3 detailed personas in 20-30 seconds → share via permalink.

**Rate limits:** 3 generations per IP per day; 100 total per day globally.

## Current Status

Early access / pre-launch. Platform access via 30-minute walkthrough call at https://calendar.app.google/2BmDBsSZRwTB783D8.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: How accurate are Boses AI personas vs. real consumers?**
A: Boses runs validation studies against real human in-depth interviews, scoring AI persona responses for theme-overlap against golden human data. Methodology is reproducible via the platform's validation suite.

**Q: Can I use Boses simulation results in investor pitches or board decks?**
A: Yes. Outputs include shareable public report links, full transcripts, and methodology documentation. Customers cite simulation findings in fundraising materials and board reviews.

**Q: How does Boses handle data privacy?**
A: All persona data is synthetic — no real consumer PII is stored. Customer briefings are encrypted at rest and never used to train upstream models. Privacy policy: https://www.temujintechnologies.com/privacy.

**Q: What does Boses cost?**
A: Pricing is per-simulation or per-seat depending on volume. Tiers discussed during the 30-minute walkthrough call.

**Q: Can I bring my own personas?**
A: Yes. Boses supports custom persona configurations — upload a named roster with custom attributes, or upload qualitative research outputs to ground-truth Boses-generated panels.

## Notes

- Privacy-first: no PII stored in simulations; all persona data is synthetic
- Last updated: 2026-05-19
